title: require (precondition)
manager: `require` — a precondition contract on a transition or action: the condition must hold on entry or the transition is a violation. This is design-by-contract's first pillar in FSL, turning "the caller must ensure X" from a hopeful comment into a checked obligation. Under a sealed or proven build it can compile out entirely, once the checker has proven it always holds, so the guarantee costs nothing in production.
cs: `require <expr>` precondition (§10); boolean expression (W6.34); violation semantics per W6.65; compiles out under sealed/proven when discharged.
